3019330.name: The Rush Official Soundtrack
3019330.description:
The retro-styled OST for The Rush is available for purchase. The soundtrack was composed as a collaborative effort between Hornbuckle Who and BuckChickens. All of the game's tracks and jingles, as well as any of their variations are included. And as a bonus, we threw in some of the game's unfinished and prototype music as well. Thank you for supporting The Rush!

Both MP3 and high quality WAV files are included. Tracks 2-40 make up the in game soundtrack, while all other tracks are included as extras.
